vocab.example: Wearing an analog watch provides a tangible connection to the past in an era dominated by intangible digital data.

vocab.meaning: sức hút về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: Beyond its basic function, I prioritize the aesthetic appeal of a watch, opting for designs that reflect my personal style.

vocab.meaning: theo dõi các chỉ số sức khỏe
vocab.example: I wear a fitness tracker primarily to track health metrics like heart rate and sleep patterns throughout the day.

vocab.meaning: kiệt tác nghệ thuật chế tác đồng hồ
vocab.example: Some people collect watches as an investment, viewing each high-end watch as a horological masterpiece.

vocab.meaning: một phụ kiện dư thừa/không cần thiết
vocab.example: With smartphones being so pervasive, many of my peers consider a traditional wristwatch to be a redundant accessory.
